title: Shinji Asuka could they would they
display_title: Shinji Asuka could they would they
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Oct 26, 2011 12:21 pm xanderkh wrote: Then, in your opinion, who would be the ideal person for Asuka not restricted to the main cast? Who is worthy of Asuka in your eyes in any continuity?

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Oct 26, 2011 12:27 pm Bagheera wrote: No one. He's got her on a pedestal no one can hope to reach.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Oct 26, 2011 12:50 pm xanderkh wrote: Her loss then. If such a continuity existed where she continued down that path, one day she's gonna find herself all alone, then she'll have no one to blame but herself.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Oct 26, 2011 12:56 pm but if Asuka is not held she'll be sad

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Oct 26, 2011 1:01 pm Bagheera wrote: Eh. In Tines' take on things (at least as I understand it) it's a moot point since such petty matters are largely beneath her. She has no use for love, she's destined for greatness! Or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Oct 26, 2011 1:34 pm Final Messenger wrote: but if Asuka is not held she'll be sad

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 26, 2011 1:49 pm xanderkh wrote: Who is worthy of Asuka in your eyes in any continuity?

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Wed Oct 26, 2011 2:08 pm Bagheera wrote: Eh. In Tines' take on things (at least as I understand it) it's a moot point since such petty matters are largely beneath her. She has no use for love, she's destined for greatness! Or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 26, 2011 2:29 pm The Asuka fixation of this recent cascade amuses me. Perhaps I'm too used to /a/. arkiel wrote: Would it be unfair to extrapolate

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Oct 26, 2011 2:47 pm With everything else about our assumptions about Asuka and the setting aside, I find it impossible to believe that any iteration of Asuka capable of recovering from the events of the Descent Arc and EoE would ever become as pathetic a creature as Ritsuko. Scientist, yes. Authority figure, yes. Broken-but-coping, yes. But engaged in a hollow relationship with a man who emotionally abuses her? No way. The last vestiges of her pride simply would not allow it.

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Wed Oct 26, 2011 5:13 pm I'd imagine whatever 2020 society has to say about child-bearing generally would be overshadowed by an insane realization to the effect that: mommy was a mommy. If I'm not a mommy, I'm not as good as mommy. And mommy was terrible. Even if she was in Unit Two she still left that shell behind and I hate her and I want to be like her and I want to be better than her so I'm going to visit Japan for the first time in six years and show up at the Third's house with a bottle of wine and then smash the bottle and press the broken handle against his neck and then I'll TAKE WHAT I WANT. Given Shinji's lineage, he'd make pretty good breeding stock.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Oct 26, 2011 6:40 pm arkiel wrote: I'd imagine whatever 2020 society has to say about child-bearing generally would be overshadowed by an insane realization to the effect that: mommy was a mommy. If I'm not a mommy, I'm not as good as mommy. And mommy was terrible. Even if she was in Unit Two she still left that shell behind and I hate her and I want to be like her and I want to be better than her so I'm going to visit Japan for the first time in six years and show up at the Third's house with a bottle of wine and then smash the bottle and press the broken handle against his neck and then I'll TAKE WHAT I WANT. Given Shinji's lineage, he'd make pretty good breeding stock.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Oct 26, 2011 6:46 pm xanderkh wrote: " Scar Tissue " .

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Oct 26, 2011 6:49 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: I know that fic is kind of sick, but I still love it.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Oct 26, 2011 6:58 pm xanderkh wrote: OT: I like it too, since it's at least going in a more hopeful direction. But unless you want to be depressed for about a week, do not read I Knew Him When. Believe me, I'd know.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Oct 26, 2011 7:13 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: the genre Drama/Angst still has me worried. I hope it turns out alright. I'm tempted to read the second one , could you save me the trouble and sum it up.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Oct 26, 2011 7:21 pm @xanderkh thanks, I will.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Oct 27, 2011 12:07 am It's a Kadmon fic. He is to angst as your typical AxS fanboy is to WAFF, and he uses it in similar blunt fashion and with about the same amount of credibility. But on the upside he's actually a decent writer, so there's that. Arkiel: I don't think she'd need the bottle.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Oct 27, 2011 7:44 am Bagheera wrote: I don't think she'd need the bottle.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Oct 27, 2011 1:31 pm Final Messenger wrote: I agree Asuka would take what she wants from Shinji when she wants it

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Oct 26, 2011 12:27 pm Bagheera wrote: No one. He's got her on a pedestal no one can hope to reach.
